mapper.sql: wh.id, wh.user_id, wh.project_id, wh.module_id, wh.work_date, wh.hours, wh.content, wh.status, wh.create_time, wh.update_time, wh.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , u.name AS user_name, p.name AS project_name, m.name AS module_name FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_task_module m ON wh.module_id = m.id WHERE wh.id = #{id} AND wh.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) FROM tb_work_hour WHERE module_id = #{moduleId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_work_hour (user_id, project_id, module_id, work_date, hours, content, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{projectId}, #{moduleId}, #{workDate}, #{hours}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_work_hour SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_work_hour SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT wh.id AS id, wh.id AS workHourId, wh.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, p.name AS projectName, m.name AS moduleName, wh.work_date AS workDate, wh.hours AS hours, wh.content AS content, wh.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_task_module m ON wh.module_id = m.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND u.role = 'PM' ORDER BY wh.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND u.role = 'PM'

SELECT wh.id AS id, wh.id AS workHourId, wh.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, p.name AS projectName, m.name AS moduleName, wh.work_date AS workDate, wh.hours AS hours, wh.content AS content, wh.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_task_module m ON wh.module_id = m.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND p.manager_id = #{managerId} AND (u.role IS NULL OR u.role != 'PM') ORDER BY wh.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND p.manager_id = #{managerId} AND (u.role IS NULL OR u.role != 'PM')

select.if: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND p.manager_id = #{userId} AND (u.role IS NULL OR u.role != 'PM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON wh.user_id = u.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND wh.status = 'PENDING' AND u.role = 'PM'

mapper.select:
SELECT p.name AS projectName, COALESCE(SUM(wh.hours), 0) AS hours FROM tb_work_hour wh LEFT JOIN tb_project p ON wh.project_id = p.id WHERE wh.is_deleted = 0 AND p.is_deleted = 0
AND wh.project_id IN (SELECT id FROM tb_project WHERE manager_id = #{userId})
AND wh.user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY wh.project_id, p.name ORDER BY hours DESC
